package.name: phm_recovery
package.description: PHM Recovery Node: subscribes to /phm/health (PolicyHealthStatus) and publishes zero-velocity Twist on /phm/cmd_vel while HOLD or STOP_AND_HOLD is active. Ports the HELIX SafetyEnvelope (per-action cooldown, RESUME exempt from cooldown, action allowlist). Provides a pluggable rewind hook for return-to-last-safe-waypoint (v0: logs and holds).
